paymentconfirmationtemplate.subject: Your simplyFYI.com account has been recharged‏

td.fieldset:
{FULLNAME},
The balance of your simplyFYI account is at or dropped below 300 UNITS. According to the simplyFYI Auto-Pay agreement, we charged your PayPal account USD {AUTOBILL-AMOUNT} and added {AUTOBILL-UNITS} UNITS on {AUTOBILL-DATE} GMT to bring the current balance to {UNITS-BALANCE} UNITS.
View Transaction Details Login to your simplyFYI account and from the Control Panel click "Manage Account Settings" and the "Usage" tab to view details of this transaction.
Questions? Contact us at support@simplyfyi.com.
Sincerely,
Team simplyFYI

div.style: font-family:Arial; font-size:10px; background-color:#fff; border:solid 1px #fff; padding:5px 0px 5px 0px; border-top:solid 1px #aaa;border-bottom:solid 1px #aaa; text-align:center

text-align:center;border-bottom-color:#C6C6C6; border-bottom-width:0px; border-bottom-style:dotted;FONT-WEIGHT: normal; FONT-SIZE: 12px; COLOR:rgb(0, 175, 227); FONT-STYLE: normal; FONT-FAMILY: arial;
